zh.lifeSummary: 當Clémence de Fouvent於大約1190年出生在法國福朗-可特艾豪-薩o福文吉賽吉安多時，她的父親Henri de Fouvent26歲，母親Agnès De Neufchâteau31歲。她於1203年與Guillaume De Vergy I在法國布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年7月之後在法國布格o-達雷勒-維吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clémence de Fouvent于大约1190年出生在法国福朗-可特艾豪-薩o福文吉賽吉安多时，她的父亲Henri de Fouvent26岁，母亲Agnès De Neufchâteau31岁。她于1203年与Guillaume De Vergy I在法国布格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年7月之后在法国布格o-達雷勒-維吉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clémence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clémence de Fouvent was born about 1190, in Fouvent-Saint-Andoche, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France, her father, Henri de Fouvent, was 26 and her mother, Agnès De Neufchâteau, was 31. She married Guillaume De Vergy I in 1203, in Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died after July 1263, in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clémence de Fouvent est née environ 1190, à Fouvent-Saint-Andoche, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Henri de Fouvent, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnès De Neufchâteau, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume De Vergy I en 1203, à Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après juillet 1263, à Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clémence de Fouvent um 1190 in Fouvent-Saint-Andoche, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri de Fouvent 26 und ihre Mutter Agnès De Neufchâteau 31. Sie hat 1203 in Burgund, Frankreich Guillaume De Vergy I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach Juli 1263 in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Fouvent è nata il circa 1190 nel Fouvent-Saint-Andoche, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Henri de Fouvent, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnès De Neufchâteau, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume De Vergy I nel 1203, nel Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il luglio 1263, nel Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Clémence de Fouventが約1190年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンフォウベント-サイント-アンドチェで生まれた時，父Henri de Fouventは26歳，母Agnès De Neufchâteauは31歳であった。1203年にフランスボウルゴグンでGuillaume De Vergy Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年7月以後にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルレウレ-バーグイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clémence de Fouvent(이)가 대략 1190년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 포우븐트-세인트-아독에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri de Fouvent(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès De Neufchâteau(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1203년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Guillaume De Vergy I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 7월 이후 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 레우레-버기에서 사망했다.

mn.environ 1190–after July 1263: ойролцоогоор 1190 он–1263 оны Долоодугаар сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Fouvent nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Fouvent-Saint-Andoche, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Henri de Fouvent, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnès De Neufchâteau, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume De Vergy I em 1203, em Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após julho de 1263, em Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clémence de Fouvent родилась около 1190 г. в местности фоувент-сеинт-андоч, хауте-саoн, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri de Fouvent было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès De Neufchâteau, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume De Vergy I в 1203 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после июля 1263 г. в местности реулле-вирги, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

sm.environ 1190–after July 1263: e tusa o le 1190–ina ua ma'ea le Iulai 1263
sm.from 1261 to 1268: mai le 1261 e o'o I le 1268

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clémence de Fouvent nació aproximadamente 1190, en Fouvent-Saint-Andoche, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Henri de Fouvent, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnès De Neufchâteau, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Guillaume De Vergy I en 1203, en Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de julio de 1263, en Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
